source: Public Vietnamese mentor networks and advisory organizations — compiled 2026-07-19
note: Seed = names + light hints only. type mentor = mentor NETWORK / advisory organization (organizations, not private individuals — no PII). Enrichment agents produce the real sourced profiles.
